overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in an orange jacket walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The journey transitions from a futuristic plaza with holographic billboards, down through commercial corridors with red neon signage, and finally onto a foggy highway sidewalk with passing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with water features and holographic billboards

events.description: character turns and begins descending wide concrete stairs to lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking through a rainy futuristic plaza with reflective pools, then descending a flight of stairs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking up the stairs in the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements and Japanese text on building facades
reflective pool with warm edge lighting surrounded by wet pavement
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and corporate logos
wide stairs with metal railings descending to lower level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-soaked futuristic plaza surrounded by towering buildings with holographic billboards. The character walks past a reflective water feature and descends a wide concrete stairwell toward a lower pedestrian level, passing other pedestrians in the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with food shops and red neon signage

events.description: exiting stairwell into red-lit commercial area with storefronts
intense red neon illumination from restaurant signage becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs and walking through a narrow commercial corridor with neon-lit shops and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person sitting against concrete wall near red graffiti

entered.detail: storefront with red frame, glass windows, and 'PIEROGI' signage
bright red Japanese characters and '24 hours' neon sign
concrete wall with red and white graffiti art and tags
illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content at end of corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends from the lower plaza into a covered commercial corridor bathed in red neon light. Passing the 'Pierogi' shop and walls covered in graffiti, the environment feels enclosed and cyberpunk, with digital billboards visible at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stairwell transitioning to highway overpass

events.description: emerging from enclosed stairs to upper level with view of highway and city
reaching top of stairs and turning toward the foggy highway

agents.ego_description: climbing graffiti-covered stairs and emerging to an upper level near a highway overpass

notable_agents.action: woman with illuminated red umbrella descending the stairs

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading 'TENOU' on distant building facade
small illuminated food vendor booth with menu displays
elevated roadway with concrete support columns and safety barriers

segments.scene_description: Continuing upward through graffiti-lined stairs, the character passes a woman with a glowing umbrella and emerges from the enclosed corridor. The 'TENOU' neon sign becomes visible against the night sky as the environment opens up toward a foggy highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway sidewalk with traffic and street lighting

events.description: entering highway sidewalk area with moving vehicle traffic and fog
multiple vehicles including a yellow taxi pass by on the wet highway

agents.ego_description: walking along a foggy highway sidewalk next to moving traffic and street lamps

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the wet highway with headlights on

entered.detail: metal barrier separating pedestrian sidewalk from multi-lane road
tall pole with bright light illuminating the foggy atmosphere
storefront with green neon 'PAWN SHOP' signage and barred windows
large advertisement mounted on highway overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a foggy highway sidewalk illuminated by street lamps. The character walks past a pawn shop with green neon signage while vehicles including a yellow taxi drive by on the wet road. The atmosphere is thick with mist and the glow of distant billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza that gradually transitions into a neon-lit commercial corridor and finally opens onto a foggy highway. It begins amidst towering buildings and holographic billboards, following the character as they pass a reflective water feature and descend a wide concrete stairwell into a misty pedestrian level. As the character ascends from the plaza, the environment shifts into an enclosed commercial corridor bathed in red neon light, passing graffiti-covered walls and a Pierogi shop. The scene then opens up as the character climbs further stairs past a woman with a glowing umbrella, emerging from the corridor toward the TENOU neon sign and a foggy overpass. Finally, the camera follows the character along a misty highway sidewalk illuminated by street lamps, passing a green-lit pawn shop while yellow taxis drive by on the wet road.
